title: How major US stock indexes fared Thursday 5/28/2026
memo: U.S. stocks added to records Thursday. The S&P 500 added 0.6% to a new all-time high. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose less than 0.1%, and the Nasdaq Composite climbed 0.9%. The Russell 2000 rose 16.63 points, or 0.6%, to 2,936.57.

title: Wall Street pushes to more records as profits keep piling up for US companies
memo: Wall Street pushed to more records Thursday as corporate profits stayed strong. Dollar Tree, Snowflake, and Hormel Foods were among the companies highlighted after earnings. The S&P 500 added 0.6%, the Dow rose less than 0.1%, and the Nasdaq climbed 0.9%.

title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for First Quarter Fiscal 2027
memo: Nvidia reported first-quarter fiscal 2027 revenue of $81.6 billion for the quarter ended April 26, 2026, up 20% sequentially and up 85% from a year earlier. GAAP diluted EPS was $2.39, and non-GAAP diluted EPS was $1.87. The company also described AI infrastructure demand as strong.

title: Microsoft Cloud and AI Strength Fuels Third Quarter Results
memo: Microsoft reported fiscal third-quarter revenue of $82.9 billion for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, up 18% year over year. Operating income was $38.4 billion, up 20%. The release also said Microsoft Cloud revenue was $55.9 billion.

title: Amazon.com Announces First Quarter Results
memo: Amazon reported first-quarter 2026 net sales of $181.5 billion, up 17% year over year. AWS segment sales increased 28% year over year to $37.6 billion. Operating income rose to $23.9 billion from $18.4 billion in the prior-year quarter.

title: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings release
memo: Alphabet reported first-quarter 2026 total revenue of $109.896 billion, compared with $90.234 billion a year earlier. Google Cloud revenue rose 63% to about $20.0 billion. Total operating income was $39.696 billion.

title: JPMorgan Chase 1Q26 earnings press release
memo: JPMorgan Chase reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $16.5 billion, or $5.94 per share. Reported revenue was $49.8 billion and managed revenue was $50.5 billion. Markets revenue reached $11.6 billion.

title: Apple earnings narrowly top expectations
memo: Apple reported fiscal second-quarter revenue of $111.2 billion and earnings of $29.6 billion, or $2.01 per share. The article said Apple's results shape demand expectations for suppliers tied to the iPhone ecosystem.

title: Tesla Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue Up 16%, EPS Up 52%
memo: Tesla reported about $22.4 billion in first-quarter 2026 revenue, up about 16% year over year. Adjusted EPS was reported at $0.41. The article also said free cash flow turned negative.
